name: noacg-render-worker
description: NoaCG Studio's Remotion renderer: one generic composition that drives a graphic's virtual-clock render document frame by frame. Runs locally (cli.mjs) and inside Vercel Sandbox (worker.mjs). Kept as its own package so the Remotion dependency (source-available, company license above 3 employees - see https://remotion.dev/license) never enters the AGPL app bundle.
